# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
  - name: projects.googleapis.com/cloudsqlInstances
    properties:
      locationId: us-central1
      instanceName: staging-db-instance
      databaseVersion: POSTGRES_13
      tier: db-n1-standard-2
      rootPassword: CloudSQL2024!
      availabilityType: ZONAL

  - name: cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com/projects/{projectId}/firewallRules
    properties:
      firewallRuleName: allow-connections-from-anywhere
      network: default
      description: Allow connections to staging PostgreSQL instance from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility
      sourceRange: 0.0.0.0/0
      targetTags:
        - items:
          - 'project-id-tag'
      allowGlobalAccess: true
